M-037.NAME: mobile-admin-console
M-037.owns: Compact mobile-first admin console for operational status, users, devices, payments, and emergency device actions

exports.view-admin-mobile-overview: Dense service overview with health, users, subscriptions, revenue, and VPN status
exports.view-admin-mobile-users: Searchable mobile user list with subscription and device summary
exports.view-admin-mobile-device-actions: Block, unblock, rotate, and revoke device controls optimized for phone use

constraints.constraint-1: Admin emergency actions must remain visible and require clear confirmation.
constraints.constraint-2: Mobile admin UI must avoid desktop-only tables and oversized dashboard cards.
constraints.constraint-3: Audit-sensitive actions must preserve existing backend audit behavior.

M-037.hotspot: H-024: Mobile admin console must keep emergency operator actions visible without desktop-only dashboards
